li.p: The function is quadratic, so the domain is {\left(-\infty ,\infty \right)}\text{.} There are no invalid inputs for this function.

Since the formula is in vertex form, we can see that the graph of F has a vertex at {\left(1.2,9\right)}\text{.} Since the leading coefficient is 4 which is positive, the parabola opens upward. So the range is all numbers greater than or equal to {9}\text{.} So the range is {\left[9,\infty \right)}\text{.}
